creator: pete@twisted.org.uk
text: is there any porgress on having this applied to the ports tree ? I just hit this as an issue as I am trying to staticly link an executable which uses both mysql and gzopen. IIf I link againsy mysql it cannot find gzopen, and if I link in the system zlib it complains about multiply defined symbols. Am sure I can work around it, but its a real pain for now...
